title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 18–18, this part focuses on Kaido, Unknown person #16, Momonosuke, Luffy, Yamato as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Yeah, I've made up my mind!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm about to head over to Luffy and the gang!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 10 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
